Comment.Value: name begin_date end_date class scope agency comment deployment CSN Canadian Seismograph Network 1897-09-01 1995-12-13 network national GSC Photographic analog, Effective 1950 REGI Regional Network 1939-12-19 network local GSC Analog; deployment ended but some sites still operating ECTN Eastern Canada Telemetered Network 1974-02-24 1997-02-12 network local GSC Digital event data, trigger system, paper records WCTN Western Canada Telemetered Network 1975-09-01 1997-03-14 network local PGC Digital not continious data, trigger, paper records CNSMN Canadian National Strong Motion Network 1979-05-24 network national GSC SLTN Sudbury Local Telemetered Network 1984-12-16 1993-06-16 network local GSC, CANMET Digital event data, closed BCH British Columbia Hydro 1985-10-01 2018-02-15 network local UBC, GSC Analog data digitized at PGC CLTN Charlevoix Telemetered Network 1987-10-30 1994-10-17 network local GSC Quebec, effective ... CNSN Canadian National Seismograph Network 1992-02-28 network national GSC Digital continious data,1992 HAITI Haiti weak and strong motion 2010-02-11 deployment field GSC Response to Haiti Mw 7.0 earthquake of 12 January 2010
